author: the_nights
description: Creates a lightweight index of Bible references and related notes. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: the_nights
manifest.description: Creates a lightweight index of Bible references and related notes.
manifest.name: Bible Reference Index

name: Bible Reference Index

releases.author: thenights20
releases.description:
Initial public testing release.

- Bible references indexed in canonical book order
- Global search across the entire collection
- Links to related notes
- Independent book selection on each device
- Desktop and mobile support
